items.title: Full control
items.description: Public or private profile, delete anytime.

items.question: What is a Proof Profile?
items.answer: A skills profile based on a standardized Work Sample. The candidate takes a 45-min evaluation and receives a score, percentile, strengths with evidence, and a badge. It's reusable and shareable.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: For candidates: yes, always. For recruiters: pool access is freemium with a limited number of profile unlocks per month.

items.question: Is this a take-home test?
items.answer: No. 45 min total, pausable, realistic scenarios. No project to submit.

items.question: How does it work for recruiters?
items.answer: You browse anonymized profiles with scores and strengths. To see details and contact a candidate, you unlock the profile. The candidate chooses whether to respond.

items.question: What roles are available?
items.answer: Currently: Backend Go, SRE / Infrastructure, and Platform Engineering. More roles (Frontend React, Backend Python, Data Engineering) coming soon.

items.question: Who sees the candidate's results?
items.answer: The candidate controls everything. If they set their profile to public, recruiters see an anonymized version. They must request access to see the name and contact info.
